resources.string: The battery limit will return at 100% or when unplugged.
When the 80% limit pauses charging, reconnect the cable to charge fully once.
80% limit reached. Reconnect within 10 seconds to charge fully once.
Open Amply and restart Shizuku to restore your protective policy.
The protective policy was rewritten, but the charging hardware has not confirmed it yet. Open Amply to check.
Confirming the protective policy with the charging hardware.
Amply works by switching your phone\'s built-in battery-protection setting. It hasn\'t been mapped for %1$s devices yet — you can help us add it.
Shares your device model, Android version, and Amply\'s compatibility check. No personal data.
This opens a public GitHub page with the details below filled in. They are sent to GitHub as soon as the page opens; nothing is posted until you submit the issue.
No browser available — copy the report and open GitHub manually
